cleaned_html_body:
Dear Team at Mark Edwards Apparel,

Your recent imports of knitwear under HS 6110 caught my attention, and I believe Arooj Enterprises can be a valuable addition to your supply chain. We’ve been supplying knitted garments to US buyers for over two decades, and our capacity of 150,000 units/month aligns well with your shipment volume.

Arooj Enterprises specializes in knitted and woven garments, including sweaters, pullovers, and sweatshirts—products that match your import profile. We’re ISO 14001, SEDEX, and OEKO-TEX certified, ensuring compliance and quality that meets US market standards. Our vertical integration allows us to control every step of production, from yarn to finished garment, guaranteeing consistency and efficiency.

With our cost-to-quality advantage in Pakistan, we can offer competitive pricing without compromising on the standards you expect. We’d love to send samples or discuss how we can support your upcoming orders—just let us know.

Best regards,
Asad Irfan | Senior Marketing Manager | Arooj Enterprises | www.texbase.com
